steps.title: Find all three angles in each triangle
steps.content: Angles in a triangle sum to $180^\circ$. Triangle DEF has $F=180^\circ-47^\circ-97^\circ=36^\circ$. Triangle RST has $T=180^\circ-47^\circ-97^\circ=36^\circ$.

steps.title: Apply the AA similarity criterion
steps.content: Two triangles are similar when two pairs of corresponding angles are equal. The problem already gives $D=R=47^\circ$ and $E=S=97^\circ$, so AA similarity is established immediately.

steps.title: Choose the statement
steps.content: Because the two given angle pairs are enough, no additional information is needed. That matches Choice D — No additional information is needed..
